summary: Great soundboard recording of a rare China‑Cat > Rider opener and an epic Eyes‑Estimated‑Franklin’s stretch, with overall strong performance despite some filler moments.
review: The SBD capture is clear and well‑balanced, often praised as “great” or “lovely” by listeners. Musically the show shines on the opening China‑Cat > I Know You Rider, a monster 22‑minute Eyes of the World that flows into Estimated Prophet and Franklin’s Tower, plus standout Althea and Easy to Love You, though a few reviewers find the overall set a bit uninspired.

ai_rating.rationale: Average reviewer rating is ~4.1; most comments are positive about both sound quality and key jams, with only occasional criticism of the set’s consistency.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Crisp, clear mix with good instrument separation; audience patches add ambience. No major drop‑outs or distortion reported.

standout_songs: China Cat Sunflower > I Know You Rider
show_quality.setlist_flow: Rare China‑Cat > Rider opener sets an upbeat tone; second set opens with Easy to Love You/Althea and launches into a massive Eyes‑Estimated‑Franklin’s sequence that many reviewers highlight as the high point.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Generally praised for hypnotic, soaring leads on the long jams (Eyes, Franklin's), though one reviewer notes a hazy tone on some numbers.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent Mydland’s piano solo in Estimated Prophet is called “cool and unusual” and positively noted.
band_member_comments.Drums: The pre‑drums segment of the second set receives high marks (5★ from a reviewer).
